# fleet-agent-mcp (Fritz)

Self-evolving AI fleet conductor agent. 68 FastMCP 3.2 tools across 16 subsystems.

## Quick Links
- README: https://github.com/sandraschi/fleet-agent-mcp#readme
- Full docs: llms-full.txt
- Install: INSTALL.md
- Changelog: CHANGELOG.md

## Architecture
Three-layer: flowforge (state machine) → heartbeat (coordinator) → coworker (worker).
Cron heartbeat → wake → check workflow → execute task → evaluate → advance.

## Key Files
- src/fleet_agent/server.py — Starlette + FastMCP HTTP server (port 10996)
- src/fleet_agent/config.py — pydantic-settings config (FLEET_AGENT_ prefix)
- src/fleet_agent/mcp/tools/ — 16 tool modules (68 tools)
- workflows/ — YAML state machine definitions
- identity/SOUL.md — Agent core identity
- webapp/ — React + Vite + Tailwind SPA (port 10997)

## Subsystems
1. flowforge (9) — YAML state machine
2. pulse (6) — TODO list with LLM validation + schedule builder + script linking
3. memory (7) — Knowledge wiki with FTS5 search + lint
4. identity (4) — Soul/North Star/User
5. teleport (3) — Soul migration (.soul archives)
6. evolution (3) — Mistake → correction → lesson
7. heartbeat (3) — Wake-up + health + pipeline liveness
8. fleet_bridge (4) — Cross-server MCP client + tool list discovery
9. codegen (3) — Code generation + file I/O
10. github (9) — Full PR lifecycle
11. contribute (1) — Autonomous contribution pipeline (persisted to DB)
12. notify (3) — Email + cron scheduler
13. coworker (3) — Portmanteau: execute flow + list + bootstrap
14. intel_hub (3) — Intel reports + AIWatcher push
15. voice (1) — Wake-word voice command routing
16. scripts (7) — Task script CRUD, run (Python/Shell/MCP Call), AI generation

## Seed Data (auto-populated on boot)
- 5 memory cards: Architecture, Fleet Servers, Coworker Flows, Script System, PR Pipeline
- 3 example scripts: Fleet Health Summary, Pending Tasks Report, Pipeline Liveness Check
